title: Mokunet Research Contribution Metadata
description: Schema for metadata.json files in the mokulearner-research contributions directory. Each metadata.json declares one or more datasets contributed by a research group.

contributor.description: Contributor slug matching an approved entry in registry/contributors.json

file.description: Filename of the data file (CSV or GeoJSON) in the same directory

description.description: Brief description of methods, coverage, and purpose

license.description: Open data license for this dataset

contribution_type.description: How this dataset integrates with the spatial governance graph. observation = geocoded environmental samples (populates environment zone layer, creates MEASURES_SDG edges). indicator = sub-county statistical data that refines county-level baselines at the moku level. spatial_overlay = GIS layers that enhance zone coverage (wetlands, land use, parcels).

moku_ids.description: Moku district IDs this dataset covers (optional — auto-derived from coordinates when possible)

coverage.description: Free-text geographic scope (required when data lacks coordinate columns and moku_ids are not provided)

topics.description: Research topics from the controlled vocabulary (domain questions, not sample media types)

sdg_codes.description: UN Sustainable Development Goal codes (optional — auto-derived from topics at ingestion)

quality.description: Quality level declared by the contributor

sample_context.description: Environmental sample metadata. Required for contribution_type 'observation', not applicable for 'indicator'. The matrix field uses a controlled vocabulary; all other fields are free-form for the research analyst.

baseline_context.description: Baseline refinement metadata for contribution_type 'indicator'. Declares which county-level Data Commons variables this dataset supplements at the moku level.

supplements.description: Data Commons variable DCIDs that this dataset refines at sub-county resolution (e.g., 'UnemploymentRate_Person', 'Median_Income_Household')

resolution_gain.description: How this dataset improves on county resolution (e.g., 'moku-level', 'neighborhood-level', 'census-tract')

comparison_method.description: How contributed values relate to the county baseline (e.g., 'direct comparison', 'proxy indicator', 'complementary measure')

schema.description: Column name to data type mapping for the data file

required_fields.description: Column names that must be present and non-null in every record
